title: A Special Design Event
article_text: My father has a special design for a new table. He sometimes carries a big paper with his research. The main condition for his design is that it must be strong. He can choose a certain wood for it. I help him cut the wood for the table. It is a big decision for him. He describes the event to me himself. The table is available for sale now. We are forward with our plan. Everything is under his law, and we bear the work together.

sentences.en: My father has a special design for a new table.
sentences.zh: 我父亲有一个特别的新桌子设计。

sentences.en: The main condition for his design is that it must be strong.

sentences.en: He can choose a certain wood for it.
sentences.zh: 他可以为它选择某种木材。

sentences.en: I help him cut the wood for the table.
sentences.zh: 我帮他切割做桌子的木材。

words.eng_def: to divide something with a sharp tool

sentences.en: It is a big decision for him.
sentences.zh: 这对他是一个重大的决定。

words.eng_def: a choice that you make after thinking

words.eng_def: to say what something is like

sentences.zh: 这张桌子现在可以出售。

sentences.en: We are forward with our plan.
Everything is under his law, and we bear the work together.
sentences.zh: 一切都在他的规则下，我们一起承担工作。

words.eng_def: a rule made by a government or person
to carry or support something difficult

image_prompts: A man (father) holding a large piece of paper with a drawing of a table, smiling.
The same man carrying a big paper with research notes under his arm.
A close-up of the design drawing with a note: 'Must be strong'.
The man pointing at different wood samples on a shelf.
A person cutting a piece of wood with a saw.
The man thinking deeply with a question mark above his head.
The man talking and gesturing to another person about an event.
A finished wooden table with a 'For Sale' sign.
Two people walking forward together with a plan chart.
Two people working together on a table, with a law book on the side.
